resourceTemplates.name: linkedin-ad-library-search
resourceTemplates.title: Search LinkedIn ads
resourceTemplates.description: Searches the LinkedIn Ad Library by `query`, optionally filtering by `country`, and supports pagination with `cursor`.

resourceTemplates.name: linkedin-ad-library-ad-details
resourceTemplates.title: Get LinkedIn ad details
resourceTemplates.description: Returns details for a specific LinkedIn ad by `ad_id`.
